name: MID PENN BANCORP INC
business: Mid Penn Bancorp, Inc. is a financial holding company whose primary business is commercial banking, attracting deposits, and making loans to businesses and individuals primarily in Pennsylvania and New Jersey. The bank offers a range of financial services including commercial real estate, residential mortgage, commercial and industrial loans, consumer loans, trust and wealth management, and insurance services through its subsidiaries.

exposures.sentence: In addition to Mid Penn Bank, Mid Penn maintains six wholly-owned nonbank subsidiaries: ... MPB Risk Services, LLC, a licensed insurance producer
The Bank also offers other services such as online banking, telephone banking, cash management services, automated teller services and safe deposit boxes.
If Mid Penn's information systems are interrupted or sustain a breach in security, those events may negatively affect Mid Penn's financial performance and reputation.

catalysts.event: Completion of acquisition of 1st Colonial Bancorp, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On September 24, 2025, Mid Penn entered into a Merger Agreement with 1st Colonial in a cash and stock deal valued at nearly $101 million. ... The acquisition was completed subsequent to year end.

catalysts.event: Completion of acquisition of Cumberland Advisors, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On September 25, 2025, Mid Penn entered into an agreement to acquire Cumberland Advisors, Inc. ... The acquisition was completed subsequent to year end.
